prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical smartphone selfie-style image of an adult woman cropped from just below the nose to mid-thigh, with no face or eyes visible. She is wearing a fitted white short-sleeve button-up blouse with a pointed collar and a high-waisted black pleated skirt. Her straight dark brown shoulder-length hair falls over both sides of her chest, with a few strands resting on the blouse. The camera is held slightly above and close to the body, angled downward in a casual mirrorless selfie perspective, showing the left arm entering from the lower-left edge. Use soft indoor natural lighting, realistic fabric wrinkles, visible shirt buttons, subtle collar shadows, and shallow depth of field. Background is an indistinct indoor room with pale flooring and a muted curtain or wall, softly blurred. Keep the composition candid and realistic, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio, no text, no logo, no watermark, no exaggerated anatomy, no explicit nudity.
